name: Disciple.Tools - Family Groups
author: cairocoder01
upgrade_notice: Upgrade to get the latest features.

sections.description: Track family relationships, marital status, and family dynamics for contacts and groups in Disciple.Tools. Adds spouse/parent/child connections, marital status, family issue tags, and a generational family tree visualization for family-type groups.
sections.installation: (Required) You must have the Disciple.Tools Theme installed before using this plugin.
